title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 24 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 24 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 24 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/07/2023
DCE iron ore futures continued to ﬂuctuate in a day by 0.06%.the main contract I2309 closed 843. some traders were activeto sell, but Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. total transactions remained insipid.PBF at Shandong port dealt 880 yuan/mt; increased 5 yuan/mt from last Friday.
